mapper.insert:
insert ignore into tb_notice_entity (notice_number, entity_value, entity_type, file_name, file_url) values
(#{item.notice_number}, #{item.entity_value}, #{item.entity_type}, #{item.file_name}, #{item.file_url})
mapper.select: SELECT e.entity_id, e.notice_number, e.entity_value, e.entity_type, e.file_name, n.notice_title, e.file_url FROM tb_notice_entity e JOIN tb_notice n ON e.notice_number = n.notice_number WHERE e.notice_number = #{noticeNumber}

SELECT DISTINCT e.entity_id, e.notice_number, e.entity_value, e.entity_type, e.file_name, n.notice_title, e.file_url FROM tb_notice n LEFT JOIN tb_notice_entity e ON n.notice_number = e.notice_number WHERE n.notice_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') -- 제목 검색 OR e.entity_value LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') -- NER 키워드 검색 ORDER BY n.created_at DESC

SELECT DISTINCT e.entity_id, e.notice_number, e.entity_value, e.entity_type, e.file_name, n.notice_title, e.file_url
FROM tb_notice n LEFT JOIN tb_notice_entity e ON n.notice_number = e.notice_number
WHERE
n.notice_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.entity_value LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY n.created_at DESC
SELECT keyword_id FROM tb_keyword WHERE standard_word = #{word}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO tb_notice_keyword_map (notice_number, keyword_id, entity_type, file_name) VALUES(#{notice_number}, #{keyword_id}, #{entity_type}, #{file_name})
mapper.select: SELECT member_id FROM tb_member_keyword WHERE keyword_id = #{keywordId}
